data.chapter_title_en: A dinner guest's invocation for his host
data.arabic_text: ((اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَهُمْ فِيمَا رَزَقْتَهُم، وَاغْفِرْ لَهُمْ وَارْحَمْهُمْ)).
data.english_text: (O Allah, bless for them, that which You have provided them, forgive them and have mercy upon them.)
data.transliteration: (Allahumma barik lahum feema razaqtahum, waghfir lahum warhamhum.)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (Allahumma barik lahum feema razaqtahum, waghfir lahum warhamhum.)
